item.title: Add-ons and fees buyers often miss
item.description: These are the add-ons and fees buyers miss when they think the deal is already done. What should shoppers review before signing?

media:content.media:title: Add-ons and fees buyers often miss
media:content.media:description: These are the add-ons and fees buyers miss when they think the deal is already done. What should shoppers review before signing?

item.title: The Auction Trap Buyers Never See Coming
item.description: A close look at the hidden part of auction deals that can turn a cheap-looking used car into a costly surprise. What should buyers watch for before bidding?

media:content.media:title: The Auction Trap Buyers Never See Coming
media:content.media:description: A close look at the hidden part of auction deals that can turn a cheap-looking used car into a costly surprise. What should buyers watch for before bidding?

item.title: A Simple Step to Review Before Signing
item.description: A quick car-buying tip to check before you sign any paperwork and see what changes. Useful for spotting dealer fees and reviewing the final numbers. What would you verify first?

media:content.media:title: A Simple Step to Review Before Signing
media:content.media:description: A quick car-buying tip to check before you sign any paperwork and see what changes. Useful for spotting dealer fees and reviewing the final numbers. What would you verify first?

item.title: Minivan Drivers vs. Prius Drivers
item.description: A lighthearted take on minivan drivers versus Prius drivers. Tell me I’m wrong before the comments turn into a riot?

media:content.media:title: Minivan Drivers vs. Prius Drivers
media:content.media:description: A lighthearted take on minivan drivers versus Prius drivers. Tell me I’m wrong before the comments turn into a riot?

item.title: Leasing vs. Buying: Which Fits Your Needs?
item.description: A comparison of leasing and buying a vehicle, covering the advantages, trade-offs, and costs of each option. The video helps viewers understand which approach may best fit different driving needs and budgets. Which would you choose—lease or buy?

media:content.media:title: Leasing vs. Buying: Which Fits Your Needs?
media:content.media:description: A comparison of leasing and buying a vehicle, covering the advantages, trade-offs, and costs of each option. The video helps viewers understand which approach may best fit different driving needs and budgets. Which would you choose—lease or buy?

item.title: Car Brands With Hidden Fees and Fine Print
item.description: A look at common fees, charges, and fine print that buyers may encounter when purchasing vehicles from different brands. The video explains what to watch for before signing a contract. What factor matters most when buying a car?

media:content.media:title: Car Brands With Hidden Fees and Fine Print
media:content.media:description: A look at common fees, charges, and fine print that buyers may encounter when purchasing vehicles from different brands. The video explains what to watch for before signing a contract. What factor matters most when buying a car?

item.title: A Deal Nearly Slips Past Unnoticed
item.description: Watch the moment the deal almost slips past unnoticed in this car buying and dealership moment. What would you have done in that situation?

media:content.media:title: A Deal Nearly Slips Past Unnoticed
media:content.media:description: Watch the moment the deal almost slips past unnoticed in this car buying and dealership moment. What would you have done in that situation?

item.title: Trade-In Pricing: Watch the Number Dealers Use
item.description: A look at trade-in pricing and the number dealers may focus on during a deal. Learn what to check before it affects your final cost. What should buyers review first?

media:content.media:title: Trade-In Pricing: Watch the Number Dealers Use
media:content.media:description: A look at trade-in pricing and the number dealers may focus on during a deal. Learn what to check before it affects your final cost. What should buyers review first?

item.title: Cash vs. Financing at the Dealership
item.description: Here’s what changes when you show up with cash instead of a payment plan. A practical look at car buying, dealer pricing, and hidden fees. What should buyers know before choosing cash or financing?

media:content.media:title: Cash vs. Financing at the Dealership
media:content.media:description: Here’s what changes when you show up with cash instead of a payment plan. A practical look at car buying, dealer pricing, and hidden fees. What should buyers know before choosing cash or financing?

item.title: Dealer Trick That Pads Their Profit
item.description: A discussion of a dealership sales practice that can increase the final price of a vehicle purchase. The video explains how buyers can identify additional charges and better understand the buying process. What car-buying tip has helped you the most?

media:content.media:title: Dealer Trick That Pads Their Profit
media:content.media:description: A discussion of a dealership sales practice that can increase the final price of a vehicle purchase. The video explains how buyers can identify additional charges and better understand the buying process. What car-buying tip has helped you the most?

item.title: Why GM Disabled This Chevy Feature
item.description: A look at why a feature on certain Chevrolet vehicles was disabled and what it means for owners. The video explores the reported reasons behind the change and its potential impact on everyday use. Do you think manufacturers should make changes like this?

media:content.media:title: Why GM Disabled This Chevy Feature
media:content.media:description: A look at why a feature on certain Chevrolet vehicles was disabled and what it means for owners. The video explores the reported reasons behind the change and its potential impact on everyday use. Do you think manufacturers should make changes like this?
